chat.welcome:
Welcome! I'm your AI {module} consultant specializing in the **{industry}** industry. I can help you with analysis, strategy, and actionable insights.

How can I assist you today? You can start with one of the suggested prompts or ask your own question.

profile.title: Profile
profile.aiModelDesc: Choose the AI model for your consulting sessions

pricing.title: Expert Consulting Marketplace
pricing.subtitle: Connect with industry experts at their own rates. Your subscription tier determines the platform commission — lower tier, lower fees.
pricing.freeDesc: Try the platform, pay per consultation
pricing.howItWorksDesc: Experts set their own consulting rates. When you book a session, the platform takes a commission based on your subscription tier. Higher tiers mean lower fees — more value goes directly to you and your consultant.
pricing.example: Example: If an expert charges $500 for a session
pricing.exampleFree: Free tier: You pay $500, expert receives $250, platform takes $250
pricing.exampleStart: Start tier: You pay $500, expert receives $350, platform takes $150
pricing.exampleGrowth: Growth tier: You pay $500, expert receives $400, platform takes $100
pricing.travelNote: Enterprise on-site visits outside the SF Bay Area may incur additional travel expenses (flights, hotel, meals) billed at cost, typically up to $2,000 per trip.
